verified_controls: two complete independent fail verdicts must agree on the exact non-none repair plan
duplicate hypotheses and exact duplicate plans abstain before provider execution
attempt count is bounded and exhausted attempts abstain
provider output may change pixels only inside the critic-bound target ROI
sibling-person masks are protected with zero allowed overlap
identical child masks terminate as no_progress
changed-pixel fraction is bounded by the sealed plan
parent PNG bytes and parent contract remain immutable
the child receives a new path, hashes, package revision, parent revision, and resealed v2 target contract
every child remains draft-only pending complete hard QC and fresh qualified strict visual review
